productDisplayName: Jockey ZONE STRETCH Men Black Trunks US20
description: Revel in the comfort of soft fabric with this boxer brief from jockey. The superior blended fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered contoured pouch offers maximum support. Crafted from a premium fabric blend of combed cotton and elastane New ultra soft waistband for a super soft, smooth and comfortable grip Trendy and smart square cut Fit Stylish side seam design and double layered contoured pouch for maximum comfort Unique leg treatment eliminates the fabric from & ldquo riding up& rdquo Mid rise fit Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
